{%- for top in page.data.top -%}

{{ top.type }}

{%- assign prev_group = "" -%} {%- for category in top.categories -%} {%- comment -%} group by path excluding last two segments ({libname}/src/) {%- endcomment -%} {%- assign parts = category.name | split: "/" -%} {%- assign parts_size = parts | size -%} {%- assign group = "" -%} {%- for part in parts -%} {%- assign idx = forloop.index0 -%} {%- assign limit = parts_size | minus: 2 -%} {%- if idx < limit -%} {%- if group == "" -%} {%- assign group = part -%} {%- else -%} {%- capture group -%}{{ group }}/{{ part }}{%- endcapture -%} {%- endif -%} {%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%} {%- comment -%} previous implementation (group by first segment only): {%- assign parts = category.name | split: "/" -%} {%- assign group = parts[0] -%} {%- endcomment -%} {%- if group != prev_group -%} {%- if prev_group != "" -%} {%- endif -%}

{{ group }}

    {%- assign prev_group = group -%} {%- endif -%} {%- for item in category.pages -%} {%- if site.filename-index -%} {%- assign name = item.filename -%} {%- else -%} {%- assign name = item.path -%} {%- endif -%} {%- if item.title -%} {%- capture link_title -%}{{item.title | xml_escape }} ({{ name | xml_escape }}){%- endcapture -%} {%- else -%} {%- capture link_title -%}{{name | xml_escape }}{%- endcapture -%} {%- endif -%}
  • {{ site.icons[item.icon] }} {{ link_title | xml_escape }}
    • {%- endfor -%} {%- endfor -%} {%- if prev_group != "" -%}
{%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%}
